emails.subject: Re: Composition of unsecured creditors committee
emails.body: Re: Composition of unsecured creditors committee Michael: Do we know who from Enron will actually be on the committee? Best, Jeff Karen Denne 04/11/2001 09:29 AM

emails.subject: RE: Composition of unsecured creditors committee
emails.body: RE: Composition of unsecured creditors committee Sorry it's taken so long, Lisa Mellencamp (legal) and I will be. See you Monday afternoon/evening at your offices at 101 California, Suite 1950. Steffes is joining us.
